name: Ed Barlow
tagline: Software engineer, database architect, and published author. Building thoughtful systems for complex problems.
home_html:
AI Enabled Hands-On Technology Leader looking for work

Current Project: Family and Friends Shared Code Platform

I am combining my Process Based Methodology and scale-proven Technology Rules into a Free Product enabling seamlessly/secure capability sharing within a group (family, friends, team)

Contact me if you want to know more or to collaborate.

The concept is exciting.

I can automatically conform with code projects you write to work within a framework, to carefully expose the capabilities in your Circle of Trust, to share resources, project data, and personal data with only those you trust.

The platform lets you share the exciting things we can now do with those you trust.

  • Control Panel - Unified project view (namespaced) plus project control
  • Capabilities - Transport agnostic capabilities provide Interoperability (Rest, CLI, Async, MCP)
  • Full Developer Platform - Consistent Builds, Context Optimized, You Control
  • Formal Workflow - Change control using Light-weight ticketing system (kanban)
  • Seamless Operations - Monitoring, Documentation, Scheduled tasks, and Data Flows

Hands On Leader at hedge funds, investment banks, insurance companies, and startups

Author, Speaker, Free Software Developer
